content:

toolCall.name: run_command
toolCall.argumentsJson:
{"CommandLine":"# Download Cloud Computing papers
$baseUrl = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Nirant07/VIT-Papers/main/cloud%20computing"
$dest = "D:\Study Papers\Joel\Cloud_Computing\CAT1"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$baseUrl/photo_2025-04-18_11-02-45.jpg" -OutFile (Join-Path $dest "photo_2025-04-18_11-02-45.jpg")
Write-Host "Downloaded cloud computing paper from Nirant07"

# Download Database Systems PDFs from CodeVinayak
$baseUrl2 = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CodeVinayak/VIT-MCA-Papers/main/%5BPMCA503L%5D%20Database%20Systems"
$dbDest = "D:\Study Papers\Joel\Database_Systems"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$baseUrl2/CAT-1%20Question.pdf" -OutFile (Join-Path $dbDest "CAT1\MCA_CAT1_Question.pdf")
Write-Host "Downloaded: DB Systems CAT-1"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$baseUrl2/CAT-2%20Question.pdf" -OutFile (Join-Path $dbDest "CAT2\MCA_CAT2_Question.pdf")
Write-Host "Downloaded: DB Systems CAT-2"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$baseUrl2/Database%20Systems%20FAT.pdf" -OutFile (Join-Path $dbDest "FAT\MCA_Database_Systems_FAT.pdf")
Write-Host "Downloaded: DB Systems FAT"

# Download Cloud Computing PDFs from CodeVinayak
$baseUrl3 = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CodeVinayak/VIT-MCA-Papers/main/%5BPMCA506L%5D%20Cloud%20Computing"
$ccDest = "D:\Study Papers\Joel\Cloud_Computing"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$baseUrl3/Cloud%20CAT-1%20Batch-2.pdf" -OutFile (Join-Path $ccDest "CAT1\MCA_Cloud_CAT1_Batch2.pdf")
Write-Host "Downloaded: Cloud CAT-1 Batch-2"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$baseUrl3/Cloud%20CAT-2%20Batch-1.pdf" -OutFile (Join-Path $ccDest "CAT2\MCA_Cloud_CAT2_Batch1.pdf")
Write-Host "Downloaded: Cloud CAT-2 Batch-1"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$baseUrl3/Cloud%20CAT-2%20Batch-2.pdf" -OutFile (Join-Path $ccDest "CAT2\MCA_Cloud_CAT2_Batch2.pdf")
Write-Host "Downloaded: Cloud CAT-2 Batch-2"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$baseUrl3/Cloud%20FAT%20Batch-1.pdf" -OutFile (Join-Path $ccDest "FAT\MCA_Cloud_FAT_Batch1.pdf")
Write-Host "Downloaded: Cloud FAT Batch-1"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$baseUrl3/Cloud%20FAT%20Batch-2.pdf" -OutFile (Join-Path $ccDest "FAT\MCA_Cloud_FAT_Batch2.pdf")
Write-Host "Downloaded: Cloud FAT Batch-2"

Write-Host "`nAll GitHub papers downloaded successfully!"","Cwd":"D:\","WaitMsBeforeAsync":10000,"toolAction":"Downloading DB and Cloud PDFs","toolSummary":"PDF batch download"}
